heavy_dependency_policy: External game and simulation engines are not installed by the default validation gate. Benchmarks start with RDF/JSON-LD parse, SPARQL query, and lightweight runner smoke coverage.

targets.mapping_claim_level: asserted UOGTO binding fixture with local RDFGameRunner smoke coverage; no external OpenSpiel round-trip claim
verification: Query UOGTO ExecutableGameGraph and ExecutionBinding nodes
Load fixture with RDFGameRunner and query a payoff profile
targets.next_adapter_step: Add optional pyspiel round-trip tests behind an extras dependency or isolated CI job.

targets.mapping_claim_level: illustrative AEC-style Markov-game binding fixture with parse/query coverage; no PettingZoo runtime dependency in default gate
verification: Query MarkovGame transition coverage required by SHACL
Query runtime and simulation binding nodes
targets.next_adapter_step: Add optional PettingZoo environment-constructor tests once an adapter module exists.

targets.target_family: finite non-cooperative game solver and interchange formats
targets.mapping_claim_level: future candidate only; GPL adapter boundary and file-format-only exchange need review before implementation
targets.next_adapter_step: Prototype a file-format fixture without linking Gambit runtime code into the default package.

targets.mapping_claim_level: future candidate for single-agent or reduction examples; lower priority than PettingZoo for multi-agent semantics
targets.next_adapter_step: Use only where a UOGTO game has a justified single-agent environment projection.

targets.mapping_claim_level: future candidate for network and agent-based simulation traces; no fixture in this track
targets.next_adapter_step: Map network-game agents, schedule steps, and event traces before adding an optional Mesa dependency.
